subject: Action Required: Your account has been flagged for deletion
text:
Hello Sneha Kapoor,

An administrator has flagged your account for deletion. If you do not reactivate within 2 minutes, your account will be permanently deleted.

Reactivate your account here:
http://localhost:5173/reactivate?token=dd3e10b3-3f4e-49fa-8a91-c794e89e0105&userId=aa9e0aa8-9531-40bb-9434-e4520a5c81de

Alternatively, simply log in to your account to cancel the deletion.
